/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/porter_stemmer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/inverted_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/bm25.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/query_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/document_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wikilens.dir/src/wiki_parser.cpp.o -o wikilens  -lpthread /usr/lib/libexpat.so
